name: habit-tracker-android
description: Habit Tracker local-first compatible Android Studio Panda

scripts.sync:web: mkdir -p www/src && cp prototype.html www/index.html && cp src/style.css www/src/style.css && cp src/app.js www/src/app.js
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
